name: Proline Adult Cat Food Pouch - Lamb Chunks in Jelly 85g
shortDescription: Proline Adult Cat Food Pouch Lamb in Jelly 85g is a complete wet food for adult cats. Made with quality lamb to support muscle health, hydration, and overall feline vitality.
description: Provide your cat with a nutritious and flavorful meal with Proline Adult Cat Food Pouch Lamb Chunks in Jelly 85g , a premium wet cat food carefully formulated to support the daily nutritional needs of adult cats of all breeds. Made with high-quality lamb as the primary protein source, this recipe helps maintain strong muscles, steady energy levels, and overall feline vitality. The tender lamb chunks in savory jelly offer a soft, moisture-rich texture that cats naturally enjoy. This makes it particularly appealing for picky eaters while also supporting hydration, which plays an important role in maintaining urinary tract health. Enriched with taurine, essential vitamins, and minerals , Proline wet cat food supports heart health, vision, immune function, and healthy skin and coat. The convenient 85g single-serve pouch ensures freshness and easy feeding, whether served as a complete meal or mixed with dry food for added flavor and moisture. Key Benefits . High-Quality Lamb Protein – Supports muscle maintenance and sustained energy. . Moisture-Rich Formula – Helps promote daily hydration and urinary health. . Highly Palatable – Tender lamb chunks in jelly appeal to even fussy eaters. . Taurine Enriched – Supports healthy heart function and vision. . Skin & Coat Support – Essential nutrients help maintain a healthy coat. . Convenient 85g Pouch – Single-serve packaging ensures freshness and easy feeding.   Feeding Guide Feed according to your cat’s weight, age, and activity level. Cat Weight Recommended Daily Feeding 2–3 kg 2–3 pouches 3–5 kg 3–4 pouches 5+ kg 4+ pouches For an average 4 kg adult cat , feed approximately 2.5–3 pouches per day . Always provide fresh drinking water. Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate unused portion after opening and consume within 24 hours. Serve at room temperature for best taste.
